FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Ancient Grove
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Scouts have discovered a magnificent primeval forest near your settlement — ancient trees of extraordinary size, their trunks wider than houses. The grove has somehow escaped logging for centuries, and its timber is of exceptional quality.

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Fell the trees. Timber this fine will fuel our growth.
Establish a sustainable logging operation. Harvest carefully and let the grove regenerate.
Preserve it. A place of beauty like this is worth more than timber.
The grove is sacred. Not one tree falls — we will guard it for the generations to come.
Clear-cut all of it. This land and everything on it is ours by right.
Build a logging road through the grove. Access improves everything.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Grove Harvested
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Logging crews descend on the ancient grove with enthusiasm. The massive trunks yield timber of extraordinary quality and quantity. Production surges temporarily, though once the grove is felled, it will not grow back.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Sustainable Forestry
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: A managed logging operation is established in the grove. Selective harvesting preserves the forest's health while providing a permanent supply of premium timber.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Grove Preserved
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The ancient forest is declared a protected reserve. Workers who visit speak of a deep peace among the towering trees, and the grove becomes a beloved landmark. The citizens take pride in their community's commitment to preservation.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Sacred Grove
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The ancient forest is consecrated as holy ground, forbidden to axe and saw alike. Pilgrims walk its paths in reverent silence, proud that their {FACTION_TITLE} keeps faith with the living world. The grove will stand for as long as your nation does.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Grove Stripped
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The grove is razed to the last stump with ruthless efficiency. The timber yield is staggering — far beyond a careful harvest — and proclaims your dominion over the land for all to see. Some among your people are unsettled by the speed and totality of the destruction, but the warehouses are full.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Logging Road
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: A well-engineered road is cut through the grove, carefully routed to minimize damage while maximizing access. The improved logistics make timber extraction more efficient and the road itself serves as a supply line that accelerates construction projects in the settlement.
